":"merkleInsertPrecompile","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"merkleVerifyPrecompile","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"owner","outputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"","type":"address"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"","type":"bytes32"}],"name":"proofMetadata","outputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"circuitId","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"publicInputsHash","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"timestamp","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"leafIndex","type":"uint256"},{"internalType":"bool","name":"exists","type":"bool"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"proofId","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"circuitId","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"bytes32","name":"publicInputsHash","type":"bytes32"},{"internalType":"uint256","name":"timestamp","type":"uint256"}],"name":"registerProof","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"leafIndex","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[{"internalType":"address","name":"_coordinator","type":"address"}],"name":"setCoordinator","outputs":[],"stateMutability":"nonpayable","type":"function"},{"inputs":[],"name":"totalProofs","outputs":[{"internalType":"uint256","name":"","type":"uint256"}],"stateMutability":"view","type":"function"}],"devdoc":{"author":"Sincerin Protocol","details":"The actual Merkle tree state lives inside the Go precompiles      (MerkleTreeInsert at 0x03...04, MerkleTreeVerify at 0x03...05).      This contract is a thin coordination layer that:        1. Enforces access control (only Coordinator can register proofs)        2. Maintains an indexed metadata mapping for proof lookups        3. Tracks the current Merkle root for cross-chain settlement      The precompiles use Poseidon hashing internally, providing ZK-friendly      Merkle proofs at ~500 gas (insert) and ~300 gas (verify) -- orders of      magnitude cheaper than pure-EVM Merkle operations.","events":{"ProofRegistered(bytes32,bytes32,uint256,bytes32)":{"params":{"circuitId":"The circuit that was proved","leafIndex":"Index of the leaf in the Merkle tree","newRoot":"New Merkle root after insertion","proofId":"Unique identifier for the proof"}}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"constructor":{"params":{"_merkleInsert":"Address of the MerkleTreeInsert precompile        (0x0300000000000000000000000000000000000004)","_merkleVerify":"Address of the MerkleTreeVerify precompile        (0x0300000000000000000000000000000000000005)"}},"getMerkleRoot()":{"returns":{"_0":"The root hash of the proof registry tree"}},"getProofMetadata(bytes32)":{"params":{"proofId":"The proof to query"},"returns":{"circuitId":"The circuit identifier","leafIndex":"Position in the Merkle tree","timestamp":"When the proof was verified"}},"isVerified(bytes32,bytes32[])":{"details":"Reconstructs the precompile input from stored metadata and the      caller-provided Merkle proof, then delegates verification to the      MerkleTreeVerify precompile.      Precompile ABI: verify(bytes32, bytes32, uint256, bytes32[32], bytes32) \u2192 (bool)      Returns ABI-encoded bool.","params":{"merkleProof":"Array of sibling hashes from leaf to root","proofId":"The proof to check"},"returns":{"_0":"True if the proof is in the Merkle tree"}},"registerProof(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,uint256)":{"details":"Flow:   1. Check proof is not already registered (idempotency guard)   2. Compute leafHash = keccak256(proofId, circuitId, publicInputsHash, timestamp)   3. Compute metadataHash = keccak256(circuitId, publicInputsHash, timestamp)   4. Call MerkleTreeInsert precompile with abi.encodePacked(leafHash, metadataHash)   5. Parse 64-byte result: newRoot (bytes32) + leafIndex (uint256)   6. Store metadata, update currentRoot, increment totalProofs   7. Emit ProofRegistered   The precompile internally computes:     leaf = PoseidonHash2(leafHash, metadataHash)   and inserts it into the sparse Merkle tree.","params":{"circuitId":"The circuit that was proved","proofId":"Unique proof identifier","publicInputsHash":"Hash of the public inputs","timestamp":"When the proof was verified"},"returns":{"leafIndex":"Index of the inserted leaf"}},"setCoordinator(address)":{"details":"Only callable by the contract owner. The coordinator is the sole      address permitted to call `registerProof`.","params":{"_coordinator":"Address of the deployed Coordinator contract"}}},"stateVariables":{"INSERT_RESULT_LENGTH":{"details":"Expected byte length returned by the MerkleTreeInsert precompile:      new_root (32 bytes) + leaf_index (32 bytes) = 64 bytes."},"TREE_DEPTH":{"details":"Number of levels in the sparse Merkle tree managed by the precompile.      Supports up to 2^32 leaves."},"coordinator":{"details":"Set by the owner via `setCoordinator`. Only this address may call      `registerProof`."},"currentRoot":{"details":"Updated atomically with each successful `registerProof` call.      This value is posted to settlement chains for cross-chain verification."},"merkleInsertPrecompile":{"details":"Fixed at 0x0300000000000000000000000000000000000004 in genesis."},"merkleVerifyPrecompile":{"details":"Fixed at 0x0300000000000000000000000000000000000005 in genesis."},"proofMetadata":{"details":"ProofMeta.exists is used as a sentinel to distinguish registered      proofs from uninitialized storage (where all fields are zero)."}},"title":"ProofRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"events":{"ProofRegistered(bytes32,bytes32,uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Emitted when a proof is registered in the Merkle tree"}},"kind":"user","methods":{"constructor":{"notice":"Deploy the ProofRegistry with references to the native precompiles."},"coordinator()":{"notice":"Address of the Coordinator contract authorized to register proofs."},"currentRoot()":{"notice":"Current root of the Merkle tree after the most recent insertion."},"getMerkleRoot()":{"notice":"Get the current Merkle root"},"getProofMetadata(bytes32)":{"notice":"Get metadata for a registered proof"},"isVerified(bytes32,bytes32[])":{"notice":"Check if a proof is verified via Merkle inclusion"},"merkleInsertPrecompile()":{"notice":"Address of the MerkleTreeInsert precompile on the Sincerin L1."},"merkleVerifyPrecompile()":{"notice":"Address of the MerkleTreeVerify precompile on the Sincerin L1."},"owner()":{"notice":"Owner of this contract. Can set the coordinator address."},"proofMetadata(bytes32)":{"notice":"Metadata for each registered proof, keyed by proofId."},"registerProof(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,uint256)":{"notice":"Register a verified proof in the Merkle tree"},"setCoordinator(address)":{"notice":"Set the Coordinator contract address that is authorized to         register proofs."},"totalProofs()":{"notice":"Total number of proofs registered in the Merkle tree."}},"notice":"Solidity interface to the native Merkle tree precompiles for storing         and verifying ZK proof hashes on the Sincerin L1.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/ProofRegistry.sol":"ProofRegistry"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":10000},"remappings":[":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/"]},"sources":{"src/ProofRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xe751db93198eb5615ed0c4b8ea3e8e76b138d58c9b2c9686cb1cb5cad48ec8a6","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://f03808f03383c03eb3c9f5ad7b91a7172d6de3a46a1c832e491a1bd8396f481e","dweb:/ipfs/QmPvEcndLL66iB4YdPpubboqrBomwjbZYLvpbZgWJqywBe"]},"src/interfaces/IProofRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x03e5d597196d7d8fc94c11e96039be764b32d0c5f082f5a0db301d37bc4b2f37","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://1dcd5ec31f0a2a11e2a096f1cf6a7cb3e80e177e8173f78e061e4105c093bad2","dweb:/ipfs/QmXBJMjjBjvEVbtBc3bEmJsi94XRv72ZMtiiDvHhtBY25S"]}},"version":1}

returns._0: The root hash of the proof registry tree

isVerified(bytes32,bytes32[]).details: Reconstructs the precompile input from stored metadata and the      caller-provided Merkle proof, then delegates verification to the      MerkleTreeVerify precompile.      Precompile ABI: verify(bytes32, bytes32, uint256, bytes32[32], bytes32) → (bool)      Returns ABI-encoded bool.

params.merkleProof: Array of sibling hashes from leaf to root

returns._0: True if the proof is in the Merkle tree

registerProof(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,ui.details: Flow:   1. Check proof is not already registered (idempotency guard)   2. Compute leafHash = keccak256(proofId, circuitId, publicInputsHash, timestamp)   3. Compute metadataHash = keccak256(circuitId, publicInputsHash, timestamp)   4. Call MerkleTreeInsert precompile with abi.encodePacked(leafHash, metadataHash)   5. Parse 64-byte result: newRoot (bytes32) + leafIndex (uint256)   6. Store metadata, update currentRoot, increment totalProofs   7. Emit ProofRegistered   The precompile internally computes:     leaf = PoseidonHash2(leafHash, metadataHash)   and inserts it into the sparse Merkle tree.

setCoordinator(address).details: Only callable by the contract owner. The coordinator is the sole      address permitted to call `registerProof`.

params._coordinator: Address of the deployed Coordinator contract

constructor.notice: Deploy the ProofRegistry with references to the native precompiles.

coordinator().notice: Address of the Coordinator contract authorized to register proofs.

currentRoot().notice: Current root of the Merkle tree after the most recent insertion.

getProofMetadata(bytes32).notice: Get metadata for a registered proof

isVerified(bytes32,bytes32[]).notice: Check if a proof is verified via Merkle inclusion

merkleInsertPrecompile().notice: Address of the MerkleTreeInsert precompile on the Sincerin L1.

merkleVerifyPrecompile().notice: Address of the MerkleTreeVerify precompile on the Sincerin L1.

owner().notice: Owner of this contract. Can set the coordinator address.

proofMetadata(bytes32).notice: Metadata for each registered proof, keyed by proofId.

registerProof(bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,ui.notice: Register a verified proof in the Merkle tree

setCoordinator(address).notice: Set the Coordinator contract address that is authorized to         register proofs.

totalProofs().notice: Total number of proofs registered in the Merkle tree.
